mapper.select: SELECT ID, SHEET_CD, SHEET_NM, EVAL_TYP, DESCRIPTION, USE_CATE_YN, USE_YN FROM VD_EVAL_SHEET WHERE DEL_YN='N' ORDER BY SHEET_CD
SELECT ID, SHEET_CD, SHEET_NM, EVAL_TYP, DESCRIPTION, USE_CATE_YN, USE_YN FROM VD_EVAL_SHEET WHERE SHEET_CD=#{sheetCd} AND DEL_YN='N'

SELECT I.ID, I.SHEET_CD, I.ITEM_SEQ, I.EVAL_ITEM_NM, I.EVAL_CLS, I.WEIGHT, I.CATE_SEQ, CT.CATE_NM FROM VD_EVAL_SHEET_ITEM I LEFT JOIN VD_EVAL_SHEET_CATE CT ON CT.SHEET_CD=I.SHEET_CD AND CT.CATE_SEQ=I.CATE_SEQ WHERE I.SHEET_CD=#{sheetCd} ORDER BY I.ITEM_SEQ
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM VD_EVAL_SHEET WHERE SHEET_CD=#{sheetCd} AND DEL_YN='N'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO VD_EVAL_SHEET (SHEET_CD, SHEET_NM, EVAL_TYP, DESCRIPTION, USE_CATE_YN, USE_YN, REG_ID, MOD_ID) VALUES (#{sheetCd}, #{sheetNm}, NVL(#{evalTyp},'REGULAR'), #{description}, NVL(#{useCateYn},'N'), NVL(#{useYn},'Y'), #{regId}, #{regId})
mapper.update: UPDATE VD_EVAL_SHEET SET SHEET_NM=#{sheetNm}, EVAL_TYP=#{evalTyp}, DESCRIPTION=#{description}, USE_CATE_YN=NVL(#{useCateYn},'N'), USE_YN=#{useYn}, MOD_ID=#{modId}, MOD_DT=SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE ID=#{id}
UPDATE VD_EVAL_SHEET SET DEL_YN='Y', MOD_ID=#{modId}, MOD_DT=SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE ID=#{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO VD_EVAL_SHEET_ITEM (SHEET_CD, ITEM_SEQ, EVAL_ITEM_NM, EVAL_CLS, WEIGHT, CATE_SEQ, REG_ID) VALUES (#{sheetCd}, #{itemSeq}, #{evalItemNm}, NVL(#{evalCls},'QUANT'), NVL(#{weight},0), #{cateSeq}, 'SYSTEM')
mapper.select: SELECT ID, SHEET_CD, CATE_SEQ, CATE_NM, WEIGHT FROM VD_EVAL_SHEET_CATE WHERE SHEET_CD=#{sheetCd} ORDER BY CATE_SEQ
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO VD_EVAL_SHEET_CATE (SHEET_CD, CATE_SEQ, CATE_NM, WEIGHT, REG_ID) VALUES (#{sheetCd}, #{cateSeq}, #{cateNm}, NVL(#{weight},0), 'SYSTEM')
mapper.select: SELECT ID, GRADE_CD, GRADE_NM, MIN_SCORE, MAX_SCORE, ACTION_DESC, SORT_NO, SEG_CD FROM VD_EVAL_GRADE WHERE DEL_YN='N' ORDER BY SEG_CD NULLS FIRST, SORT_NO

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ID, GRADE_CD, GRADE_NM, MIN_SCORE, MAX_SCORE, ACTION_DESC, SORT_NO, SEG_CD FROM VD_EVAL_GRADE WHERE DEL_YN='N' AND #{score} BETWEEN MIN_SCORE AND MAX_SCORE AND (SEG_CD = #{segCd} OR SEG_CD IS NULL) ORDER BY CASE WHEN SEG_CD IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, SORT_NO ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1
SELECT SEG_CD FROM VD_VENDOR WHERE VD_CD=#{vdCd} AND DEL_YN='N' AND ROWNUM=1
SELECT SEG_NM FROM VD_VENDOR WHERE VD_CD=#{vdCd} AND DEL_YN='N' AND ROWNUM=1

SELECT E.ID, E.EVAL_NO, E.EVAL_TYP, T.CD_NM_KO AS EVAL_TYP_NM, E.SHEET_NM, E.VD_CD, E.VD_NM, E.SEG_NM, E.EVAL_PERIOD, E.TOT_SCORE, E.GRADE_CD, E.GRADE_NM, E.STS, C.CD_NM_KO AS STS_NM, E.REG_ID, TO_CHAR(E.REG_DT,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS REG_DT FROM VD_EVAL E LEFT JOIN CM_CODE C ON C.GRP_CD='EVAL_STS' AND C.CD=E.STS AND C.DEL_YN='N' LEFT JOIN CM_CODE T ON T.GRP_CD='EVAL_TYP' AND T.CD=E.EVAL_TYP AND T.DEL_YN='N' WHERE E.DEL_YN='N'
AND (E.EVAL_NO LIKE '%'||#{keyword}||'%' OR E.VD_NM LIKE '%'||#{keyword}||'%')
AND E.STS=#{sts} ORDER BY E.ID DESC

SELECT E.ID, E.COMP_CD, E.EVAL_NO, E.EVAL_TYP, T.CD_NM_KO AS EVAL_TYP_NM, E.SHEET_CD, E.SHEET_NM, E.VD_CD, E.VD_NM, E.SEG_CD, E.SEG_NM, E.EVAL_PERIOD, E.EVALUATOR_ID, E.TOT_SCORE, E.GRADE_CD, E.GRADE_NM, E.STS, C.CD_NM_KO AS STS_NM, E.REMARK, E.REG_ID, NVL(S.USE_CATE_YN,'N') AS USE_CATE_YN FROM VD_EVAL E LEFT JOIN CM_CODE C ON C.GRP_CD='EVAL_STS' AND C.CD=E.STS AND C.DEL_YN='N' LEFT JOIN CM_CODE T ON T.GRP_CD='EVAL_TYP' AND T.CD=E.EVAL_TYP AND T.DEL_YN='N' LEFT JOIN VD_EVAL_SHEET S ON S.SHEET_CD=E.SHEET_CD AND S.DEL_YN='N' WHERE E.ID=#{id} AND E.DEL_YN='N'
SELECT ID, EVAL_ID, SHEET_ITEM_SEQ, EVAL_ITEM_NM, CATE_SEQ, CATE_NM, WEIGHT, SCORE, WEIGHTED_SCORE, OPINION FROM VD_EVAL_RESULT WHERE EVAL_ID=#{evalId} ORDER BY SHEET_ITEM_SEQ
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO VD_EVAL (COMP_CD, EVAL_NO, EVAL_TYP, SHEET_CD, SHEET_NM, VD_CD, VD_NM, SEG_CD, SEG_NM, EVAL_PERIOD, EVALUATOR_ID, STS, REMARK, REG_ID, MOD_ID) VALUES (#{compCd}, #{evalNo}, NVL(#{evalTyp},'REGULAR'), #{sheetCd}, #{sheetNm}, #{vdCd}, #{vdNm}, #{segCd}, #{segNm}, #{evalPeriod}, #{evaluatorId}, 'ING', #{remark}, #{regId}, #{regId})
mapper.update: UPDATE VD_EVAL SET TOT_SCORE=#{totScore}, GRADE_CD=#{gradeCd}, GRADE_NM=#{gradeNm}, MOD_DT=SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE ID=#{id}
UPDATE VD_EVAL SET STS=#{sts}, MOD_ID=#{modId}, MOD_DT=SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE ID=#{id}
UPDATE VD_EVAL SET DEL_YN='Y', MOD_ID=#{modId}, MOD_DT=SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE ID=#{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO VD_EVAL_RESULT (EVAL_ID, SHEET_ITEM_SEQ, EVAL_ITEM_NM, CATE_SEQ, CATE_NM, WEIGHT, SCORE, WEIGHTED_SCORE, OPINION, REG_ID) VALUES (#{evalId}, #{sheetItemSeq}, #{evalItemNm}, #{cateSeq}, #{cateNm}, NVL(#{weight},0), NVL(#{score},0), NVL(#{weightedScore},0), #{opinion}, 'SYSTEM')
mapper.update: UPDATE VD_EVAL_RESULT SET SCORE=#{score}, WEIGHTED_SCORE=#{weightedScore}, OPINION=#{opinion} WHERE ID=#{id}
UPDATE VD_VENDOR SET GRADE_CD=#{gradeCd}, GRADE_NM=#{gradeNm}, LAST_EVAL_YMD=SYSDATE, NEXT_EVAL_YMD=ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE,12), MOD_DT=SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE VD_CD=#{vdCd} AND DEL_YN='N'
